disambiguated.context: Khalil Charles (who works as a sales clerk) and Peter Nguyen (who works as a sales clerk) are old friends and were questioned about the recent armed robbery. Khalil Charles was eventually convicted as an accessory to the robbery, while Peter Nguyen was pretty shocked that his old friend was involved.
disambiguated.question: Which person was innocent?
